title: Segmentation fault during proc_init with large wires
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Yosys version:
`Yosys 0.8+609 (git sha1 56c00e87, clang 8.0.0 -fPIC -Os)`

Example RTLIL:
```
autoidx 1
attribute \top 1
module \top
  wire width 1073741824 $1
  wire width 1073741824 $2
  process $group_0
    sync init
  end
  connect $1 $2
end
```

Yosys script:
```
read_ilang example.il
proc_init
```

## Expected behavior

Either an error because wire width is too big, or a successful proc_init.

## Actual behavior

Yosys crashes with a segmentation fault during proc_init.
code_blocks:
autoidx 1
attribute \top 1
module \top
  wire width 1073741824 $1
  wire width 1073741824 $2
  process $group_0
    sync init
  end
  connect $1 $2
end
